delivery.access: No loading-bay lift; one truck at a time; single lift for vertical movement

moveDate: 5-day relocation · approx. 60 m³ · team of 8 · 5 trucks

lineItems.description: Day 1: pack kitchen/desks; begin dismantle & shrink-wrap (8 crew: 4F + 4M)
Day 2: dismantle, wrap, stage loads (8 crew)
Day 3: finish dismantle; begin load & transport (8 crew)
Day 5: reassembly, rubbish removal, prep office ready (8 crew)

notes: Dropoff site has no loading-bay lift. Acoustic/silent pods are dismantled at the origin, transported flat, and reassembled on site.
Dropoff is restricted to one truck at a time for parking (client to arrange additional access) and a single lift for all vertical movement. This is built into the 5-day timeline.
Includes dismantle, wrap, pack, transport, reassembly, and on-site rubbish removal by the crew.
Pickup site has simple access with a loading-bay lift.
Dedicated dump run (transporting waste to a disposal facility) is available as an optional extra at additional cost.
